texto: When it comes to dress, we are supposedly free to wear whatever we want - but if this is the case, why do we wear such similar clothes? Why are we choosing to wear shoes that are almost perfectly designed to make walking as difficult as possible?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Caroline Criado-Pérez que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “When it comes to dress, we are supposedly free to wear whatever we want - but if this is the case…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fashion, society, com foco em society.
